---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Found something broken? Tell us about it.
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Ubuntu]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- Node version (if running locally): [e.g. 20.x]
- Python version (if running locally): [e.g. 3.12]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. console errors, network errors).
